title: Aranet CO2 Above OSHA/ASHRAE Indoor Air Thresholds
app: Custom HEC or scripted input from Aranet Cloud API / Aranet PRO base station
spl:
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-4h
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, co2, ""))
| eval band=case(co2>=5000,"danger", co2>=1000,"warning", 1=1,"ok")
| where band!="ok"
| stats latest(co2) as co2_ppm latest(band) as band values(location) as sites by sensor_id
description: CO2 buildup signals poor ventilation and affects cognition; extreme levels create safety risk in enclosed spaces.
value: Protects workers under occupational health expectations and documents responses for audits.
implementation: (1) Extract `co2_ppm`. (2) Set warning 1000 ppm and danger 5000 ppm to policy. (3) Page facilities on danger. (4) Trend HVAC corrections.
visualization: Single value in-warning; table by sensor; heatmap by floor.
grandmaExplanation: We alert when carbon dioxide gets too high so air stays safe to breathe.
